query_normalized: assessing orbital period dependence of the exoplanet radius gap physics
rationale: This paper measures the slope of the radius gap as a function of incident flux, which is the canonical physical proxy for orbital period dependence in exoplanet demographics (Rule b). It also investigates the specific physical mechanisms (photoevaporation vs. core-powered mass-loss) driving the gap, directly addressing the "physics" component of the user's question (Rule a).
